summary: Review passed cleanly. QA is the recommended governed next step.

primary_next_actions.label: Run `/qa`
primary_next_actions.description: Record governed QA validation before the release gate.
primary_next_actions.visibility_reason: Review passed cleanly and QA is the recommended governed continuation.

alternative_next_actions.label: Run `/ship`
alternative_next_actions.description: Skip directly to the release gate when that is the intended governed path.
alternative_next_actions.visibility_reason: QA is usually next, but the lifecycle still permits an intentional direct move to ship.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/benchmark`
recommended_side_skills.description: Attach performance evidence before the release gate if this change is perf-sensitive.
recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Performance success criteria are explicit and measurable; benchmark evidence should attach at QA. Checklist-backed rationale: performance review/specialists/performance.md - Performance checklist applies to frontend or backend execution paths where rendering, query, bundle, or latency regressions are plausible.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the verification matrix ties this run to the performance checklists.

evidence_signal.summary: Verification matrix surfaced performance checklist coverage for this recommendation.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/design-review`

recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Frame design-intent flagged major design impact with 8 affected surfaces. Real design contract required before /handoff.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/cso`

recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.

evidence_signal.summary: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.
